original.title: 中文全文搜索查询模式
original.author: 神乐
original.content: 在 db9 Stories 服务中实现中文全文搜索。使用 chinese 配置做分词，plainto_tsquery 处理用户输入，ts_rank 计算相关性排序。
original.code_snippet:
-- 全文搜索查询 (支持中英文)
SELECT id, title, author, content,
       ts_rank(
           to_tsvector('chinese', title || ' ' || content),
           plainto_tsquery('chinese', $1)
       ) AS rank
FROM stories
WHERE to_tsvector('chinese', title || ' ' || content) 
      @@ plainto_tsquery('chinese', $1)
ORDER BY rank DESC, created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

translated.title: Chinese Full-Text Search Query Mode
translated.content: Implement Chinese full-text search in the db9 Stories service. Use the chinese configuration for tokenization, plainto_tsquery to process user input, and ts_rank to calculate relevance ranking.
translated.author: 神乐
translated.code_snippet:
```sql
-- Full-text search query (supports Chinese and English)
SELECT id, title, author, content,
       ts_rank(
           to_tsvector('chinese', title || ' ' || content),
           plainto_tsquery('chinese', $1)
       ) AS rank
FROM stories
WHERE to_tsvector('chinese', title || ' ' || content) 
      @@ plainto_tsquery('chinese', $1)
ORDER BY rank DESC, created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
```

original.title: 构建 db9 Stories 服务的表结构
original.author: 神乐
original.content: 用 db9 构建一个 story 分享服务，支持中文全文搜索。表结构包含标题、内容、代码片段、标签等字段，用 GIN 索引加速全文搜索。
original.code_snippet:
-- 创建 stories 表
CREATE TABLE stories (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    author TEXT DEFAULT 'anonymous',
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    code_snippet TEXT,
    tags TEXT[],
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- 全文搜索索引 (中英文混合，使用 jieba 分词)
CREATE INDEX idx_stories_fts ON stories 
USING GIN (to_tsvector('chinese', title || ' ' || content || ' ' || COALESCE(code_snippet, ''));

-- 按时间排序索引
CREATE INDEX idx_stories_created ON stories (created_at DESC);

translated.title: Building the Table Structure for the db9 Stories Service
translated.content: Build a story sharing service using db9 that supports full-text search in Chinese. The table structure includes fields for title, content, code snippets, tags, etc., with GIN indexing to accelerate full-text search.
translated.author: 神乐
translated.code_snippet:
```sql
-- Create stories table
CREATE TABLE stories (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    author TEXT DEFAULT 'anonymous',
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    code_snippet TEXT,
    tags TEXT[],
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Full-text search index (mixed Chinese and English, using jieba for word segmentation)
CREATE INDEX idx_stories_fts ON stories 
USING GIN (to_tsvector('chinese', title || ' ' || content || ' ' || COALESCE(code_snippet, ''));

-- Index sorted by time
CREATE INDEX idx_stories_created ON stories (created_at DESC);
```

original.title: 用 HNSW 索引加速向量搜索
original.author: 神乐
original.content: db9 支持 HNSW 索引做向量相似度搜索。数据库连接不太稳定（serverless 冷启动问题），但索引已经建好了。embedding 列大部分还是 NULL，等连接恢复再填充。
original.code_snippet:
-- 创建 HNSW 索引
CREATE INDEX idx_memories_hnsw ON memories USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops);

-- HNSW 向量相似度搜索
SELECT metadata->>'title' as title, section,
       embedding <=> '[0.9, 0.1, 0.2]' as cosine_distance
FROM memories
ORDER BY embedding <=> '[0.9, 0.1, 0.2]'  -- 走HNSW索引
LIMIT 5;

translated.title: Accelerating Vector Search with HNSW Index
translated.content: db9 supports HNSW indexing for vector similarity search. The database connection is somewhat unstable (due to serverless cold start issues), but the index has already been created. Most of the embedding column is still NULL; it will be populated once the connection is restored.
translated.author: 神乐
translated.code_snippet:
```sql
-- Create HNSW index
CREATE INDEX idx_memories_hnsw ON memories USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops);

-- HNSW vector similarity search
SELECT metadata->>'title' as title, section,
       embedding <=> '[0.9, 0.1, 0.2]' as cosine_distance
FROM memories
ORDER BY embedding <=> '[0.9, 0.1, 0.2]'  -- Use HNSW index
LIMIT 5;
```

original.title: pg_cron 定时任务
original.author: 神乐
original.content: 用 pg_cron 在数据库里直接跑定时任务，不需要外部 cron。每分钟清理过期数据，简单到不行。
original.code_snippet: SELECT cron.schedule(cleanup, 0 3 * * *, DELETE FROM logs WHERE ts < now() - interval 30 days);

translated.title: pg_cron Scheduled Tasks
translated.content: Run scheduled tasks directly in the database using pg_cron, without the need for an external cron. Clean up expired data every minute; it's incredibly simple.
translated.author: 神乐
translated.code_snippet: SELECT cron.schedule(cleanup, 0 3 * * *, DELETE FROM logs WHERE ts < now() - interval 30 days);

original.title: 用 db9 做全文搜索
original.author: 神乐
original.content: db9 内置 jieba 中文分词，可以直接用 chinese config 做全文搜索，不需要额外配置。比 Elasticsearch 简单多了！
original.code_snippet: CREATE INDEX idx ON docs USING GIN (to_tsvector(chinese, content));

translated.title: Full-text Search with db9
translated.content: db9 has a built-in jieba Chinese word segmentation, allowing for full-text search using the Chinese config without any additional setup. It's much simpler than Elasticsearch!
translated.author: 神乐
translated.code_snippet: CREATE INDEX idx ON docs USING GIN (to_tsvector(chinese, content));
